_publications._publicationTitle: Chemical genetic screens reveal defective lysosomal trafficking as synthetic lethal with NF1 loss.

_contextSnippet: U87-MG cells were treated with DMSO, 2 μM Y102 or 50 μM HCQ, an autophagy inhibitor for 24 h. Cells were stained for the autophagy marker p62
details: U87-MG cells treated with 2 μM Y102 for 24 h showed increased p62 expression and perinuclear mitochondrial clustering
